fields.name: dbId
fields.description: The unique identifier of the XGL Dimension.

fields.name: code
fields.description: The code representing the XGL Dimension.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A description of the XGL Dimension.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the XGL Dimension was created.

fields.name: modifiedAt
fields.description: The timestamp when the XGL Dimension was last modified.

fields.name: allowPosting
fields.description: Specifies whether posting is allowed for this dimension.

fields.name: ownerDbId
fields.description: The unique identifier of the dimension's owner.
